_note: Local workaround cache for TimeLog classification lists. The TimeLog v1 API caps list endpoints (e.g. GET /ProjectType) at 10 records and has no working paging (see docs/runbooks/empirical-put-test.md and the support ticket), so the live API alone cannot return every project type. list_project_types merges this cache with the live result. UPDATE THIS FILE MANUALLY whenever project types change in TimeLog — and especially if the MCP server is ever used to add/edit project types — otherwise the merged list will be stale. projectCategories is complete (the API returns all 4); projectTypes is INCOMPLETE: TimeLog reports 27 types but only the ones observed so far are listed here.
